title: VoxGo v0.4.0
notes: Reduced ASR impact on PUBG/APEX/Valorant-style gameplay with stricter weak-candidate budgeting.
Improved Fast + Pure English guidance for English game voice; English-only models download on demand.
Filtered repeated short-phrase Whisper hallucinations before they reach translation.
Kept Full packages focused on bundled multilingual small/base models; English-only models are not pre-bundled.
